pageText.title: Bride of Trouble: Alanon style Step 10

questions: DID WE AVOID ANGER & RESENTMENT TODAY?
WERE WE HONEST IN EVERY SITUATION & WITH EVERYONE TODAY?
DID WE STAY OUT OF SELFISHNESS & SELF-CENTEREDNESS TODAY?
DID WE MAKE AMENDS FOR ANY HURTS WE MAY HAVE CAUSED TODAY?
DID WE STAY OUT OF SELF-PITY TODAY?
DID WE TRY TO BE KIND AND LOVING WITH EVERYONE TODAY?
IF OUR FEELINGS WERE HURT TODAY, DID WE FORGIVE?
DID WE STAY CLOSE TO OUR H.P, ASKING TO DO HIS WILL TODAY?
DID WE REACH OUT TO ANOTHER ALCOHOLIC TODAY?
DID WE GO TO AN A.A.MEETING TODAY?
DID WE READ OUR BIG BOOK OR THE 12 & 12 TODAY?
DID WE GET HUMBLE ON OUR KNEES TODAY?
